title: Possible appearance of Mari as a child in manga
display_title: Possible appearance of Mari as a child in manga
wikitext:
[]: Possible appearance of Mari as a child in manga?! Post by oxooxo » Thu Aug 27, 2009 3:57 am Ok I haven't taken the time to read all the threads possible on this topic so I guess maybe someone brought it up already and I haven't seen evangelion 2.0 and i'm only judging from the illustration drawings i've seen of Mari. Anyway i was re-reading the evangelion manga -again- while looking up info on this "new" character Mari. There is an intriguing ressemblance between the girl that appears in Asuka's flashback pages 5 and 6 of chapter 60 (or pages 81-82 of volume 9) and the Eva 2.0 screenshot or drawings of Mari. Well, true enough, the kid isn't wearing glasses but she has the same manga style eye signature and the same facial structure. She doesn't appear later anymore in the manga but the kid is obviously also a potential Eva pilot... Too bad the manga isn't entirely in color.... It doesn't give us much info on Mari's background and anyway the manga, the anime and the new movie's don't have the same storyline so it's no big deal but I just wanted to see what everyone thought of this... Again sorry if this is an answered question and no new entry to the Eva plot... Cheers

[]: Post by LiLi » Thu Aug 27, 2009 4:20 am To be honest, rather than with the kid, I find a resemblance with "that woman" with glasses... (the shape of the eyes and such seem a rather typical 'trademark' of Sadamoto's style, so to speak?) What do you think?

[]: Post by oxooxo » Thu Aug 27, 2009 5:30 am Never really thought of a link with the woman behind... since that would make it totally anachronic... though she's the guardian and kids either grow up like their "parents" or in a seemingly totally opposite way (this is not a psychological essay - but it's a quite accurate observation of child developpement)... that could explain the ressemblance as she grows up... As for Sadamoto's tradmark, i do agree but there are at least three major teen eyes, Shinji, Asuka and Rei which are quite different... The kids eyes would be closest to a mix between Rei and Asuka which is somehow Mari's eye design... Also the kid and Mari's chin is slightly "larger" and less pointy than Asuka or Rei if we really want to get picky in the sadamoto drawing detail... Clearly Sadamoto has never really been a very diverse facial designer (Nadia, Eva, FLCL - don't get me wrong on this for i really like his work) but which mangaka can really claim so... maybe Eiichiro Oda for crazy absurd characters designs in "recent" shonen manga... It's quite a pity we don't learn more on this "competition" between Asuka and the mysterious kid... Gotta go Cheers

[]: Post by trueno_twentyone » Thu Aug 27, 2009 9:35 am Eh...don't think so.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Aug 27, 2009 10:47 am Well, it would not be the first time something from other parts of the Eva influence made their way into the manga. I remember the double bladed chainsaw from Evangelion 2 made its way in. However I doubt that girl is anything more than a one shot, and I really don't think Sadamoto would include Mari so late in the game. We are of course in EoE territory now.

[]: Post by oxooxo » Thu Aug 27, 2009 11:32 am Two ways to read evangelion... most obvious and also probably closest to how mangaka work... evangelion is full of one shots which result in a complete senario mess leading to endless speculations on who is who and when is that... which allows Anno to "rebuilt" Evangelion almost 15 years later and Sadamoto (while sticking quite close to the original anime while still drawing his own fan fict which in the end might be what the third impact is all about - Anno is in the end reediting his fanfict of his own work... I sometimes doubt he has anything left to share with us that isn't Eva related - a little like Yukito Kishiro with Gunm and Last Order) to keep on drawing the manga with the lowest update frequency i've ever seen in the business... which could exlpain why she dosn't appear earlier... 14 years to draw 11 volumes of a story that had already been written - without Mari but volume 9 came out in 2004 and Anno "left" gainax in 2006 with the main purpose of rebuilting Eva... 2 years in sadamoto schedule isn't much - so we could argue that there might be some coincidence... Or you can see it as hardcore story telling where nothing shown or not shown is arbitrary... but i doubt that though i'd like to think they are... even Urasawa Naoki isn't that good though 20th Century Boys and Monster brought manga to another level, plot wise... As for Chapter 60, I don't see how that's chonologically in EoE... though it is true it was drawn after EoE was released...

[]: Post by NAveryW » Thu Aug 27, 2009 1:46 pm She does look a lot like Mari, yes. I feel it's a coincidence since it's the same character designer and there are really only so many variations one can use when adding countless background characters, but it would be a really precious cameo.

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Aug 27, 2009 1:50 pm That kid looks nothing like Mari. At all.

[]: Post by cambaprecoz » Thu Aug 27, 2009 2:06 pm My deepest sentiments for derailing this thread, but the manga is in hiatus, right? is there any hope for Sadamoto to finish it in our lifetimes? Also, I don't think Sadamoto went and made his own version of the series with all the changes he introduced, he obviously consulted Anno many times before doing something (or atleast I hope so) so theorizing that THAT page and the little girl being Mari was planned all along is not that much of a strectch (atleast to me). Anno had been proven many times, especially in this site with all the silly nitpicking we do, that he is GENIUS. <--- Anno.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Aug 27, 2009 5:25 pm We've had the "Is Mari Asuka's step-sister?" idea floated at least once before. cambaprecoz wrote: but the manga is in hiatus, right?

[]: Post by cambaprecoz » Thu Aug 27, 2009 8:28 pm My bad, I though the manga was in a five years hiatus, don't ask me why, tho.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Aug 27, 2009 9:16 pm I see more of a coincidence to "that woman" (Asuka's foster mother) then the girl. This issue was discussed before, but I'm chalking it up to a case of the characters being drawn by the same guy, Sadamoto.

[]: Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 28, 2009 11:55 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: I'm chalking it up to a case of the characters being drawn by the same guy, Sadamoto.

[]: Mari's identity Post by KaaVI » Wed Oct 13, 2010 1:53 am i was re-reading some eva manga and i cam across this. this girl bears an extremely close resemblance to Mari and as we can see her mother(possibly) has glasses, and last i checked poor eyesight is hereditary hence the glasses. this is only a theory however i would like you guys to contribute

[]: Post by NAveryW » Wed Oct 13, 2010 2:34 am http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=7516
